title: Senior-Friendly Activities in the Swiss Alps
excerpt: Gentle hikes, scenic railways, and relaxing experiences perfect for active seniors exploring Switzerland.
author: Lena Brunner
content:
Switzerland's mountains aren't just for extreme adventurers. Many of the best alpine experiences are perfectly suited for active seniors.

## Scenic Railways
- **Glacier Express** — The world's most famous train ride, Zermatt to St. Moritz
- **Bernina Express** — UNESCO heritage route through the Alps
- **GoldenPass Line** — Lucerne to Montreux through stunning landscapes

## Accessible Mountain Experiences
- **Pilatus Golden Round Trip** — Boat, cogwheel train, and gondola circuit
- **Rigi** — The "Queen of Mountains" with gentle summit walks
- **Stanserhorn CabriO** — Open-top cable car with revolving restaurant

## Gentle Hikes
- **Lauterbrunnen Valley** — Flat valley walk among 72 waterfalls
- **Five Lakes Walk, Zermatt** — Moderate trail with spectacular Matterhorn views
- **Swiss National Park** — Well-maintained paths through pristine nature

## Wellness
- **Leukerbad Thermal Baths** — Therapeutic hot springs in the Alps
- **Lavaux Wine Tasting** — Gentle vineyard walks with wine

**Senior tip:** The SBB Half-Fare Card (CHF 185/year) cuts train fares in half and includes discounts on many mountain railways. The GA Travelcard offers unlimited travel for a flat annual fee — excellent value for frequent travelers.

Use our age group selector to see senior pricing across all activities. Many offer reduced rates for over 65s.
